contents: {a=Peopla_Braig}Braig{/} decides to finally marry the mystical {a=Peopla_DemWomen}Dem Women{/}. They initially planned to get Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson to be the priest and have him hold two plushies of themselves. But, it wasn't in the budget. {a=Peopla_Aheko}Aheko{/} (his old friend) objected to this wedding and began an emotional rant:
"I object to this wedding! You two are too young to be throwing your lives away like this."
"Braig, I thought you were better than this. We were supposed to finish the last level of The Last Of Us. How are you gonna do that, now that you're getting married?"
"You scoundrel! You corrupted my friend with Welcome to the Cum Zone and other stupid things girls do. How dare your ass!"
"Bitch! We were going to travel the world together, go to the UK, eat a lot of food, and go see Joe Bean the Movie staring Nickolas Cage!"

"Braig, I've known you for like 420 years. We met in kindergarten. We sat next to each other, in class. You even introduced me to [Dem Women] and I thought she was cool. But not anymore. She's a bitch out of line. Everybody pray the pimp's prayer. Let's hope this bitch gets back in line!"
"After everything we've been through. I was the one that bailed you out of jail. I gave you one of my left kidneys. And now you're having these jokes without me? Screw you!"
They were then chased out by a special forces agent with a glock.

{a=Peopla_Rick}Rick{/} has revealed that his playdough has been laced with a copious amount of explosive gunpowder. He let slip this information during {a=Peopla_Aheko}Aheko's{/} game of Who Wants To Be A Millionaire. This could be the same substance use in the truck explosion of August 2024.
{a=Peopla_Pixel}Pixel{/} has broken there leg in a car crash. {a=Peopla_Lynx}Lynx{/} bit them to turned them into a naga until their leg gets better.
